title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Vertex Systems operates critical infrastructure serving 100M+ end users globally. Our SRE team is responsible for reliability, latency, and efficiency of all production services. You'll define SLOs, build automation to eliminate toil, and lead incident response for the most complex system failures.
responsibilities: Define and enforce SLOs for 50+ production services
Build toil-reducing automation saving 10+ hours/week per engineer
Lead blameless post-mortems and drive systematic reliability improvements
Mentor software engineers on reliability best practices
